v8:item.v8:content: Return of financial documents to supplier
Return on the same day basis
Возврат оплаты клиенту на платежную карту

Возврат тары от клиента прошлых периодов
Return package from a customer of previous periods
Return of goods from the customer
Возврат товаров от клиента прошлых периодов
Goods return from a customer of previous periods
Return of goods to the supplier
Restore VAT of an issued advance
Financial document issue to advance holder
Issue cash to another cash fund
Cash withdrawal out of cash register
Repurchase of returnable package by customer
Salary payment according to the payroll card program
VAT deduction by a tax agent
VAT deduction from an issued advance
VAT deduction from a received advance

Income according to agent report on write-off
Корректировка поступления со списанием на расходы

Корректировка поступления с отражением на прочих доходах

Корректировка реализации с отражением на прочих доходах
Sale adjustment with recording other income
Exchange rate differences for funds (exchange gain)
Exchange rate differences for funds (exchange loss)

Курсовые разницы от взаиморасчетов с клиентами (убыток)
Exchange differences from mutual settlements with customers (loss)

Accrue VAT from the received advance
